arts.ttl: Second club now interested in Rangers player – Meeting takes place, decision for Philippe Clement’s side
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Trabzonspor are also in the race to sign Rangers defender Rıdvan Yılmaz. There have been reports in recent days that Rangers could offload the Turkey international despite Philippe Clement starting him in the past three games. Gune Bakis today report on the latest developments regarding the future The post Second club now interested in Rangers player – Meeting takes place, decision for Philippe Clement’s side appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City join West Brom in pursuit of Rangers man
arts.sum: Birmingham City have joined West Brom in pursuit of Rangers defender Adam Devine, according to the Daily Mail… The post Birmingham City join West Brom in pursuit of Rangers man appeared first on The72 - Football League News.
